331.reason: [Error: After judgeErrorK() which already consumes the ']' token if present, this extra pos++ incorrectly skips the next token (e.g., '='), causing the parser to miss the assignment operator and potentially leading to incorrect parsing or out-of-bounds access.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: After judgeErrorK() which already consumes the ']' token if present, this extra pos++ incorrectly skips the next token (e.g., '='), causing the parser to miss the assignment operator and potentially leading to incorrect parsing or out-of-bounds access.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: After judgeErrorK(), the position should already be advanced past the ']' if present, or the error is recorded. The extra this.pos++ skips an additional token, causing misalignment.]

1711.reason: Incorrect: using `repeat` results in duplicate "<UnaryExp>" lines. Should be only one "<UnaryExp>\n" after the simpleUnaryExp.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Incorrect: using `repeat` results in duplicate "<UnaryExp>" lines. Should be only one "<UnaryExp>\n" after the simpleUnaryExp.

298.reason: Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when tokens list has insufficient elements; also does not check current token type.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when tokens list has insufficient elements; also does not check current token type.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos is at or near the end of the token list; lacks bounds checking and does not verify that the current token is INTTK before looking ahead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos + 1 >= tokens.size(); lacks bounds checking before accessing list elements
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokens.get(this.pos + 1) without checking if pos + 1 is within bounds may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds: accessing pos+1 without checking if pos+1 < tokens.size(); also incorrect logic for detecting main function which should check tokens[pos] is INT and tokens[pos+1] is MAIN]

300.reason: Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when tokens list has fewer than 3 elements.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when tokens list has fewer than 3 elements.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos is near the end of the token list; unsafe lookahead without bounds checking.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos + 2 >= tokens.size(); lacks bounds checking before accessing list elements
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokens.get(this.pos + 2) without checking if pos + 2 is within bounds may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds: accessing pos+2 without checking if pos+2 < tokens.size(); also unreliable logic for detecting function definitions]
